Xue Xu ËñõÁèù
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Xu (ËñõÁèù). An envoy to Shu, warned Sun Xiu that Shu was doomed. Led armies against Jin. Xue Xu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
